reviews.review_description: Bad don’t download
I mean for the price you can't really complain about anything but few little changes here and there and it'll be a little sister of the game breachers :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! We appreciate your feedback, and we're committed to making improvements to become the number one choice for gamers. To better understand your suggestions and make the necessary changes, we encourage you to share your thoughts with us on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN.

Your input is invaluable, and we look forward to hearing more about the specific changes you'd like to see in the game. Your support helps us strive for excellence and deliver an even better gaming experience.

reviews.review_description: Keep up the good work and polish this concept.

I like what little ive seen of it but for some reason during the tutorial when I'm trying to use the claymore Iput it in its place and it explodes but nothing happens. I want to give this a better rating I just would like to progress LOL.
Wow thank you for such a fast response.   I'm excited as hell to try it again now so keep up the good work.
Edit:  Easily the quickest fix I've ever seen in a virtual reality game. This developer really is on top of things. Thank you

Really good game 
Question for the developers when is the full game coming out?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much!
The full game is out on every platform, you can find the quest version here: https://www.meta.com/experiences/6476030305773017
and the PC version here: https://www.meta.com/experiences/pcvr/6354681451289102/

for more information here's our channel for more information: https://www.youtube.com/@gooddaygamestudio/videos
Discord: https://discord.gg/p7AFBhPnZ6

reviews.review_description: Changing height would be useful.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, you can use auto adjust in the watch menu by pressing the man icon, Also you have sit\stand option in the main menu, Hope it helps!

reviews.review_description: Your doing well on the level, almost to the end, and then you get shot once and have to completely restart. I feel like they should add some checkpoint system to make me want to play this game. It gets to a certain point where you just rage quit. The tutorial also wasn’t helpful, it would randomly just stop working. Overall, I wouldn’t buy this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, The game is still in pre-release and a huge point of the demo is to receive feedback.
checkpoint is something we consider, We just added the human feature to help balance the game, As it is a stealth shooter using advanced tactics\tricks is the key.
About the tutorial, As the game is still being worked on those things could happen but if you let us know we are very keen to fix it, So any bug or difficult part you can report on our Discord and we look into it: https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN

Also here are some awesome stealth examples a tester sent us, In the hope you still have faith in the game: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NyTkE1jUT4Q

reviews.review_title: Skibidi Kai cenet fanum tax toilet!!!!!
reviews.review_description: As his slapped me in the face with his big black shlong I was knocked out I can’t handle all these black men this game was really good cute butt
It's really good for a demo and this is the future
It's definitely got a lot of bugs and stuff that needs to be fixed. But If the creator keeps updating I think this could get really good

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing the game and taking the time to review it. As a developer, I am committed to providing the best possible experience for players. Since its release, I have been updating the game daily to bring it closer to its intended vision.

To continue improving, I need as much feedback as possible from users like you. If you'd like to be a part of this process, please join our Discord community and report any bugs or issues you encounter. Your input will help me provide you with the best game experience. https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN And

Once again, I appreciate your support and feedback as I strive to create an even better game. Thank you for being a part of this journey, and I look forward to hearing from you on our Discord server.

reviews.review_description: After I played the demo and I loved it so much I decided to play the actual game and I can say it doesn’t disappoint me at all the enemy AI is so good and advanced same with your partner ai. I love the stealth combat and I love how you can go in stealth or guns Blazing and it’s so fun and I would definitely recommend this game.
Not guidance where to go after the hostage on lvl2

developer_response.body: Hey, Thanks for the review, the game should end if you kill all the enemies and complete the objective, I'll add a fix to the level next update, Thank you!

reviews.review_description: AMAZING STEALTH GAME. great depth in  the gameplay. Put it on wishlist. Will buy when released. At last a good single shooter with great Ai and lot of depth.....this developer is a true genius.   No mindless shooting.  The demo has so much replayability...incredible. wether you use teamate or not it  gives out different scenarios....the teamate command is intuitive....long live this game and  of course long live meta.

So far I’ve had a blast I played the first few levels. I like the companion you get it makes this game stand out and be unique. The game has few flaws and of those flaws they are very minor and barely affect gameplay. I would recommend to give this game a shot. There’s not many stealth games in VR and this is one of my favorites, if not my favorite.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words! The game is still a work in progress, and I love receiving feedback and improving it.

You can find more information and hidden tips on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@gooddaygamestudio

Our Discord server is also available, where you can request to join the testers group: https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN

And of course, any suggestions or ideas you would like to see are welcome at: gooddaystudio.games+Support@gmail.com.

Thank you so much for the support!

reviews.review_title: FIX THE CLAYMORE IN THE TUTORIAL
reviews.review_description: I followed all the directions for the claymore part of the tutorial and the claymore wouldn't explode can you fix it because it's really starting to piss me off

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that, A fix should be available now.
Please submit bug reports to our discord to get the fastest replay: https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN
The game is still in pre-release and your support means a lot.

reviews.review_description: this game is amazing but add these things pls multiplayer jumping and make level 2 easier pls but good game but i cant beat lv 2 :[
But claymore tutorial was a little bit annoying it wouldn't explode so I was trapped there so I went to the first mission fun game I'm probably going to buy it you should try it

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, your support means a lot. and a fix is available now.

reviews.review_description: Probably the best replacement for Pavlov shack this is really fun to act like a special force team
Looks good, has good potential but... very buggy! Weapons on the ground can't be picked again,  training stage can't be completed, and characters behave weirdly. Please fix, this can be very good

developer_response.body:
H, sorry to hear that but I didn't notice that, can you please send more details about what and where you couldn't pick weapons? and do you mean grenade as the rifle comes back automatically? 
Which training level and why you couldn't completed? 
you can reach me at discord https://discord.gg/p7AFBhPnZ6 or via mail: gooddaystudio.games@gmail.com Thanks for the feedback

reviews.review_title: Very realistic game in terms of tactical
reviews.review_description: This game tactical gameplay can sometimes be very realistic, from the health and enemy detection, extremely good for a demo.
